description_long: This is a three-seater couch with a deep blue base and seat cushions, complemented by three large backrest cushions and two armrest pillows upholstered in a darker blue fabric adorned with a repeating white floral or snowflake pattern. The seat cushions are broad and flat, providing ample sitting space, while the backrest cushions are plump and slightly rounded for comfort. The armrest pillows are smaller and positioned at each end, matching the backrest's patterned fabric. The base of the couch features a subtle geometric pattern, adding a touch of visual interest to the lower section. The couch appears to have a solid, blocky form with no visible legs, giving it a grounded and contemporary look. This piece would be suitable for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A deep blue, three-seater couch with patterned back and armrest cushions, a solid base, and a modern, legless design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three patterned backrest cushions, three seat cushions, and two matching armrest pillows.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the seat and backrest cushions, and the armrest pillow's placement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous patterned backrest and the solid, geometric-patterned base with no visible legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the armrest pillow and the depth of the seat and backrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose backrest cushions and three seat cushions, with two smaller matching armrest pillows at each end; all cushions are visibly separate and not tufted.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Backrest and armrest cushions feature a repeating white floral or snowflake motif on dark blue fabric, while the seat and base are solid deep blue with a subtle geometric pattern on the lower base.
attribute_leg_style: No visible legs; the base is solid and extends to the floor, giving a blocky, grounded appearance.
attribute_armrest_design: Armrests are formed by loose, pillow-style cushions placed at each end, matching the backrest's patterned fabric and sitting atop the seat cushions.
attribute_backrest_type: High, loose, and cushioned backrest divided into three large sections, each with a rounded, plush appearance and patterned upholstery.
